creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
Maintainer of dns/opendnssec,
    
    Please note that PR ports/179142 has just been submitted.

Note that a similar PR has been submitted earlier, see
<http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/178860>.

William Grzybowski <wg@freebsd.org> asked two days ago a question
about the PR 178860, which I answered (see below),  but after that
I didn't see a reaction yet.

I rather would like to see this solved first and than we probably
don't need the PR 79142.

	jaap

> 
> wg asked:
>     Care to explain why the CONFLICTS line if there is no 1.4* in ports?
> 
> I aswered:
> 
> There is one waiting to be admitted to the ports
> (http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/178861) which will
> install opendnssec-1.4. The opendnssec.org people say that 1.4 branch
> is way more then just an update of 1.3 and should in hindsight be
> called 2.0. Sine the 1.4 and the update of 1.3 happened at the same
> time, I anticipate on this situation.
